### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf03777-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Download from Google Drive

### Download from Google Drive

googleDrive — `download` operation against the connected account.

Next: Parse CSV Contents

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Parse CSV Contents

Parses the incoming CSV binary into JSON items.

Next: Clean & Reshape Rows

### Clean & Reshape Rows

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming document records to a stable schema

Next: Load Rows into Google Sheets

### Load Rows into Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Repack as XLSX

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Load Rows into Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Repack as XLSX

Serializes items to a XLSX binary file.

Next: Archive Processed File (Google Drive)

### Archive Processed File (Google Drive)

googleDrive — `upload` operation against the connected account.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Send Summary to Microsoft Teams

### Send Summary to Microsoft Teams

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

nodes.name: Note: Send Summary to Microsoft Teams

parameters.content:
# Create quotes with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive at scale

**Pattern:** Document Generation · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Create quotes with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive at scale. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual invoices is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Download from Google Drive → Parse CSV Contents → Clean & Reshape Rows → Load Rows into Google Sheets → Repack as XLSX → Archive Processed File (Google Drive) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to document generation without manual effort
- Anyone automating invoices in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your invoices process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
